idea-plugin.name: Safe Paste
idea-plugin.description:
Prevents accidental execution of multiline commands when pasting into the terminal.

When using shells like PowerShell that do not support bracketed paste mode, pasting multiple lines can immediately execute each line as a separate command.

Safe Paste intercepts multiline paste operations and lets you choose:

  • Paste as Plain Text – safe, non-executing paste
  • Paste Anyway – execute commands line by line
  • Cancel – abort paste

Single-line paste remains unchanged.
